title: AN ACT CHANGING CERTAIN NAMES OF BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LILOY, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1336 / 55 OG No. 28, 5174 (July 13, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2223, May 16, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING CERTAIN NAMES OF BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LILOY, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The names of the following barrios in the Municipality of Liloy, Province of Zamboanga del Norte, are changed, to wit:

Barrio Liloy Beach to Barrio Baybay; and

Barrio Liloy Townsite to Barrio Liloy.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, May 16, 1959.
